# Perl regular expressions for paths that are to be ignored.  This file must not
# contain any blank lines, or all files will be excluded.
# Binary files
[^/]\.png$
# Global files
(?:^|/)\.gitmodules$
(?:^|/)go\.mod$
(?:^|/)go\.sum$
# configuration for check-spelling itself
^\.github/actions/spelling/
^\Q.github/workflows/spelling.yml\E$
# dependabot configuration has lots of URLs and other non-spell-checkable things.
^\.github/dependabot\.yml$
# Other CI
^\Q.golangci.yaml\E$
# Exclude test data
/testdata/
/test-data/
# Exclude vendored files
/vendor/
^node_modules/
# Exclude generated CRD files
^rdd/pkg/controllers/.*/crd\.yaml$
# Generated files
^rdd/pkg/apis/[^/]+/[^/]+/applyconfiguration/
^dist/
^\Qpkg/rancher-desktop/assets/extension-data.yaml\E$
^pkg/rdd-client/gen/
# Other front end files
^\Qpkg/rancher-desktop/assets/styles/fonts/_dots.scss\E$
^\Qpkg/rancher-desktop/assets/styles/fonts/_zerowidthspace.scss\E$
^\Qpkg/rancher-desktop/utils/processOutputInterpreters/__tests__/assets/build.txt\E$
^\Qpkg/rancher-desktop/utils/processOutputInterpreters/__tests__/assets/pull03.txt\E$
^\Qpkg/rancher-desktop/utils/processOutputInterpreters/__tests__/assets/push.txt\E$
^pkg/rancher-desktop/assets/scripts/logrotate-k3s$
^pkg/rancher-desktop/assets/scripts/logrotate-lima-guestagent$
^pkg/rancher-desktop/assets/fonts/
^pkg/rancher-desktop/utils/__tests__/assets/safeRename/safeRename\.tar$
^yarn\.lock$
# Vendored from moby/profiles
^\Qpkg/rancher-desktop/assets/scripts/seccomp.json\E$
^pkg/rancher-desktop/sudo-prompt/
^pkg/rancher-desktop/utils/processOutputInterpreters/__tests__/assets/trivy-image-postgres
ignore$
/translations/(?!en)
# Mostly image names
^\Qscripts/assets/extension-data.yaml\E$
